title: Potion Optimizer
description: This mod makes your pots like zero ping even on high ping
body:
How it works.

Instantly throws the potion so that it looks like zero ping, the potion is still there until the server confirmed the potion has been thrown. Or another way to put it, it makes potions look like they are instantl on your screen, while the server is still processing the real potion.

Requires YACL, Mod Menu, and Silicon
